---
title: "LLM-Experiment"
author: "Maria Cuellar"
date: today
resource-path:
  - ..
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: body
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

We begin by loading the packages used.

```{r setup}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Overview
